deny-c: Does CA argue that '{x}' does not {xy_relation} '{y}'?
miti: Does CA argue that a slot Z directly mitigates the relation: '{x}' {xy_relation} '{y}'? If yes, what is that Z? Please extract that from the counter-argument.
ano-z: Does CA argue there is a thing other than '{x}' that also {zy_relation} '{y}'? If yes, what is that thing? Please extract that from the counter-argument.
no-evi: Does CA explicitly argue that IA doesn't mention any evidence to support that '{x}' {xy_relation} '{y}'?
no-need-address: Does CA argue that '{y}' is not important or is not a problem that requires any action to be taken?
y-sup-same-z: Does CA argue that '{y}' suppresses a {z_polarity_y_sup_z} thing? If yes, what is that thing? Please extract that from the counter-argument.
y-pro-opposite-z: Does CA argue that '{y}' promotes a {z_polarity_y_pro_z} thing? If yes, what is that thing? Please extract that from the counter-argument.
x-pro-z: Does CA argue that '{x}' promotes a {z_polarity_x_pro_z} thing? If yes, what is that thing? Please extract that from the counter-argument.
x-sup-z: Does CA argue that '{x}' suppresses a {z_polarity_x_sup_z} thing? If yes, what is that thing? Please extract that from the counter-argument.
trans1: Does CA argue that '{x}' {trans1} '{y}'? If yes, what is that thing? Please extract that from the counter-argument.
trans2: Does CA argue that '{x}' {trans2} '{y}'? If yes, what is that thing? Please extract that from the counter-argument.
